race.comment: YOU CAN CALL ME AL (1) is close to breaking through after two consecutive placings, the latest at Belmont Park over 2100m. Will find this easier and he's capable of testing this field. LORD ARCADIA (6) improved last time out, beaten a nose at the end of 1600m at Geraldton. Has an awkward barrier but he gives every indication the middle distance will suit and has plenty of scope for improvement. AHH CHOUX (8) also presents third-up and did a good job from back in the field at Belmont. Had stepped up sharply to the middle distance and is sure to have taken improvement. Finally draws a handy gate and benefits from a 2kg claim. KODY'S BELLE (11) and FARADIO (5) are both going well enough to consider.
